title: Temporarily disable failing Windows Installer CI test
body:
The test that checked that, on Windows, file `99-podman-machine-provider.conf` is not overridden when Podman is updated is failing after the release of Podman v5.2.0. 

This PR temporarily disables the test to unblock PR checks on main branch.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?


```release-note
None
```

comments.body: When will the root problem be fixed?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *l0rd*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> When will the root problem be fixed?

I am working on it. Not sure what's the root cause yet. I will update [the dedicated issue](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/23502) as soon as I make progress.
